headline: You have reached the Tiny Emergency Hotline.
subhead: For faster service, pretend your Wi‑Fi is a metaphor.
bulletins: All representatives are currently 'in another meeting' (emotionally).
Your issue has been placed in a velvet-lined shrug queue.
Press 2 if you opened the fridge and forgot your entire personality.
Thank you for your patience. We will not be using it responsibly.

feature.name: Policy of the Day
feature.description: A new policy clause has been issued and immediately ignored with confidence.
